```

Na=function e(l){var n=a[l];if(void 0!==n)return n.exports;var s=a[l]={exports:{}};return t[l](s,s.exports,e),s.exports}(502);const ka=(0,Na.A)(Va,[['__scopeId','data-v-5d9ab512']]);$(()=>{const t=(0,l.createApp)(ka).use(e());t.mount('#app'),$(window).on('pagehide',()=>t.unmount())});
//# sourceMappingURL=index.js.map</script><style>.status-card[data-v-5d9ab512]{width:100%;max-width:100%;height:100%;background-color:rgba(255,248,250,.95);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid rgba(255,192,203,.5);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(12px);font-size:14px;color:#8b576e;display:flex;flex-direction:column}.tabs[data-v-5d9ab512]{display:flex;background-color:rgba(255,240,244,.9);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,192,203,.5);flex-shrink:0;overflow-x:auto;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;scrollbar-width:none}.tabs[data-v-5d9ab512]::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}.tab-button[data-v-5d9ab512]{flex:1 0 ```
```
